sentences.target: Am Wochenende fahren wir an die Küste.
sentences.reading: /am ˈvɔxənˌɛndə ˈfaːʁən viːɐ an diː ˈkʏstə/

translations.de: Am Wochenende fahren wir an die Küste.
translations.ipa: /am ˈvɔxənˌɛndə ˈfaːʁən viːɐ an diː ˈkʏstə/
translations.en: We’re driving to the coast this weekend.
translations.es: Este fin de semana vamos a la costa.
translations.fr: Ce week-end, on va à la mer.
translations.ru: В эти выходные мы едем на побережье.
translations.pt: Neste fim de semana vamos à praia.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này chúng tôi đi biển.
translations.ar: في نهاية الأسبوع سنذهب إلى البحر.
translations.nl: Dit weekend gaan we naar de kust.
translations.uk: Цими вихідними ми їдемо на узбережжя.
translations.hi: इस सप्ताहांत हम समुद्र तट पर जा रहे हैं।
translations.pl: W ten weekend jedziemy nad morze.
translations.nb: I helgen drar vi til kysten.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini kami pergi ke pantai.
translations.sv: I helgen åker vi till kusten.
translations.da: I weekenden tager vi til kysten.

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'an' with the dative article 'dem'; introduces a temporal prepositional phrase in the dative ('am Wochenende').
Noun (neuter) in dative singular governed by 'am'; denotes the time frame.
Finite main verb in V2 position; present tense, 1st person plural; denotes motion/travel.
Personal pronoun, nominative 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Preposition indicating direction; governs the accusative ('an die Küste').
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks 'Küste' as the object of 'an' (directional).
Noun (feminine) in accusative singular as the destination complement of 'an'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder bauen Sandburgen an der Küste.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈbaʊ̯ən ˈzantˌbʊʁɡən an deːɐ ˈkʏstə/

translations.de: Die Kinder bauen Sandburgen an der Küste.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈbaʊ̯ən ˈzantˌbʊʁɡən an deːɐ ˈkʏstə/
translations.en: The children are building sandcastles at the coast.
translations.es: Los niños están construyendo castillos de arena en la playa.
translations.fr: Les enfants construisent des châteaux de sable sur la plage.
translations.it: I bambini stanno costruendo castelli di sabbia in spiaggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在沙滩上堆沙堡。
translations.ru: Дети строят песчаные замки на пляже.
translations.pt: As crianças estão construindo castelos de areia na praia.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang xây lâu đài cát trên bãi biển.
translations.ar: الأطفال يبنون قلاعًا من الرمل على الشاطئ.
translations.nl: De kinderen bouwen zandkastelen op het strand.
translations.uk: Діти будують піщані замки на пляжі.
translations.hu: A gyerekek homokvárakat építenek a strandon.
translations.hi: बच्चे समुद्र तट पर रेत के किले बना रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Dzieci budują zamki z piasku na plaży.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά φτιάχνουν κάστρα από άμμο στην παραλία.
translations.id: Anak-anak sedang membangun istana pasir di pantai.
translations.ro: Copiii construiesc castele de nisip pe plajă.
translations.cs: Děti staví na pláži hrady z písku.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは浜辺で砂の城を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural introducing the subject noun 'Kinder'.
Noun (plural) functioning as subject (nominative).
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural agreeing with 'Die Kinder'.
Compound noun, accusative plural; direct object of 'bauen'.
Preposition marking static location; governs the dative ('an der Küste').
Definite article, dative feminine singular for 'Küste' as complement of 'an' (location).
Noun (feminine) in dative singular; location complement of 'an'.

sentences.target: Es ist heute windig an der Küste.
sentences.reading: /ɛs ɪst ˈhɔʏtə ˈvɪndɪç an deːɐ ˈkʏstə/

translations.de: Es ist heute windig an der Küste.
translations.ipa: /ɛs ɪst ˈhɔʏtə ˈvɪndɪç an deːɐ ˈkʏstə/
translations.en: It’s windy today at the coast.
translations.es: Hoy hace viento en la costa.
translations.fr: Il y a du vent aujourd’hui sur la côte.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ở bờ biển gió lớn.
translations.nl: Vandaag waait het aan de kust.
translations.hu: Ma szeles az idő a tengerparton.
translations.hi: आज समुद्र तट पर तेज हवा चल रही है।
translations.nb: I dag blåser det ved kysten.
translations.id: Hari ini angin kencang di pantai.
translations.da: I dag blæser det ved kysten.
translations.ja: 今日は海辺は風が強いです。

tokens.explanation: Pronoun functioning as expletive/dummy subject, typical in impersonal weather statements.
Copular auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; links the subject with the predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Predicate adjective describing the weather; complements the copula 'ist'.
Preposition marking static location; governs the dative.
Definite article, dative feminine singular for 'Küste'.
Noun (feminine) in dative singular; location complement of 'an'.

sentences.target: Meine Tante wohnt nahe der Küste.

translations.de: Meine Tante wohnt nahe der Küste.
translations.en: My aunt lives near the coast.
translations.es: Mi tía vive cerca de la costa.
translations.fr: Ma tante habite près de la mer.
translations.it: Mia zia vive vicino al mare.
translations.ru: Моя тётя живёт недалеко от побережья.
translations.pt: Minha tia mora perto da praia.
translations.nl: Mijn tante woont dicht bij de kust.
translations.hu: A nagynéném a tengerpart közelében lakik.
translations.hi: मेरी मौसी समुद्र तट के पास रहती हैं।
translations.el: Η θεία μου μένει κοντά στη θάλασσα.
translations.ro: Mătușa mea locuiește aproape de mare.
translations.da: Min tante bor tæt på kysten.
translations.ja: 私のおばは海の近くに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Tante'.
Noun (feminine) nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; denotes residing.
Preposition meaning 'near'; typically governs the dative.
Definite article, dative feminine singular for 'Küste' as complement of 'nahe'.
Noun (feminine) in dative singular; object/complement of the preposition 'nahe'.

Los niños están construyendo castillos de arena en la playa.

Mi tía vive cerca de la costa.

Les enfants construisent des châteaux de sable sur la plage.
Il y a du vent aujourd’hui sur la côte.
